message:
fix(io): forward poll_read_vectored through &mut/Box/Pin blanket impls and add long-line regression The AsyncReadVectored blanket implementations for &mut R, Box, and Pin

had empty bodies that fell back to the default scalar poll_read, silently discarding vectored dispatch. This meant callers using trait objects or pinned wrappers never got true scatter-gather reads even when the inner type supported them. All three impls now explicitly delegate to the inner poll_read_vectored. Also adds a regression test in io/lines.rs confirming that Lines does not impose a hidden line-length cap on large single-line inputs (tested at 128 KiB). Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context)
